title: Platform Engineer I
description: Join Render's platform engineering team to build the infrastructure enabling developers to deploy and scale applications effortlessly.
responsibilities: Design and implement platform services for developer productivity
Build automation and tooling for deployment and infrastructure management
Collaborate with customer-facing teams on feature development
Contribute to platform documentation and best practices
Participate in on-call rotation and incident response

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Competitive salary with annual equity grants
Flexible time off and work arrangements
